packet_complete_when: Every retained New Mexico education-routing repair row points at a reviewed official county-to-district or county-to-REC contract, or at a reviewed district-owned / regional local-routing leaf with county-grade coverage evidence, rather than the generic PED root or statewide-only leaves.

rejected_queue_contamination.reason: wrong-role cross-host candidate leaked into PED education queue

next_allowed_sources: official county-to-district or county-to-rec crosswalks derived from public PED-managed directory exports
district-owned special-education or student-services leaves on k12 district domains
regional education or county-owned student-support directories if they preserve county-labeled local routing

bounded_live_probe_result.conclusion: Retire the dead legacy host and stop treating the timing-out PED host as the only discovery lane. The live `webed.ped.state.nm.us` directory and workbook exports now provide official district and REC inventory, but the blocker remains an absent county crosswalk or county-labeled local routing contract.
